title: narcissus bulbocodium subsp. ectandrus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. ectandrus, also known as the Hoop Petticoat Daffodil, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to be used as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, due to its content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. ectandrus include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to help reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
